name: Layout Mode OBS Bypass
description: Play with Layout Mode on your screen while OBS captures normal gameplay via Spout2.

enabled.name: Enable Dual Render
enabled.description: Toggle dual rendering (Layout Mode on screen, normal in OBS)

spout-name.name: Spout Sender Name
spout-name.description: Name of the Spout2 sender (use this in OBS Spout2 Capture)
